zh.Huntington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾
zh.of Hunstanton, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯坦頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Senlis於大約1146年出生在英國史洛普爾斯沃迪時，她的父親Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton50歲，母親Isabelle de Beaumont27歲。她於大約1167年與John le Strange I結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1178年在英國享年33歲。

zh-hans.Huntington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾
zh-hans.of Hunstanton, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯坦頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Senlis于大约1146年出生在英国史洛普爾斯沃迪时，她的父亲Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton50岁，母亲Isabelle de Beaumont27岁。她于大约1167年与John le Strange I结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1178年在英国享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Senlis was born about 1146, in Cheswardine, Shropshire, England, her father, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, was 50 and her mother, Isabelle de Beaumont, was 27. She married John le Strange I about 1167. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1178, in England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Senlis est née environ 1146, à Cheswardine, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Beaumont, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange I environ 1167. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1178, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Senlis um 1146 in Cheswardine, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton 50 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Beaumont 27. Sie hat um 1167 John le Strange I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1178 im Alter von 33 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Senlis è nata il circa 1146 nel Cheswardine, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Beaumont, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John le Strange I circa 1167. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1178, nel England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Senlisが約1146年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェスワーディンで生まれた時，父Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northamptonは50歳，母Isabelle de Beaumontは27歳であった。約1167年にJohn le Strange Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1178年にイギリスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Senlis(이)가 대략 1146년 영국 슈럽실르 체스워딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Beaumont(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1167년 John le Strange I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 영국에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Hunstanton, Norfolk, England: Hunstanton, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Senlis nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Cheswardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Beaumont, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange I aproximadamente 1167. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1178, em Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Senlis родилась около 1146 г. в местности чесвардаин, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Beaumont, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange I около 1167 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1178 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Senlis nació aproximadamente 1146, en Cheswardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Beaumont, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John le Strange I aproximadamente 1167. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1178, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
